do we have any kind of accounting to know how many tokens were using for the different things (input, output, cache, etc)
Token tracking is fragmented across multiple paths—cache tokens are tracked only in recall-repl, while the capture pipeline and archeologist lack cache token accounting.
usage shouldn't have been coupled to recall -- it should be global to ANY and ALL llm calls! including claude-cli
Refactored usage tracking into a canonical Usage struct in src/usage.rs and updated all LLM modules (openrouter, claude_cli, claude_sidecar, recall) to use it.
